extension.summary: Translate CZ/SK subtitles and queue remote OpenSubtitles upload
extension.description: Finds nearby subtitle files, reuses cached Ukrainian translations from a remote helper when available, otherwise translates them with the DeepL API, produces bilingual ASS subtitles, and can queue the Ukrainian upload on a remote helper such as LibreELEC on Raspberry Pi.
extension.news: v0.1.17 - Ask the helper for a fast first embedded dual-subtitle chunk, then continue with longer chunks - Keep token-protected Kodi media relay for local Stream Cinema proxy streams
